content_gaps: Focusing on a single, high-quality piece of jewelry vs. a roundup of many disparate gift ideas (wind chimes, blankets, etc.).
The meaning behind specific symbols used in memorial jewelry (e.g., specific animals, runes, natural elements relevant to Moon Raven Designs' aesthetic).
The concept of jewelry as a tangible, wearable keepsake that can be kept close during the grieving process, as opposed to a decorative object.
Guidance on how to present a memorial gift with sensitivity and care.
Highlighting the craftsmanship and unique, non-mass-produced nature of a handcrafted piece, which is largely absent in the Etsy/Amazon-dominated SERPs.
